name: Chien Kuo Construction Co., Ltd.
summary: Chien Kuo Construction Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the construction business in Taiwan and China. The company offers construction services for residential buildings, factory and office buildings, public facilities, and commercial buildings; undertakes the related electrical and mechanical engineering of air-conditioning, water and electricity, fire-fighting, intelligent building, etc.; and manages electromechanical projects. It also manufactures and sells commercial concrete; and participates in concrete supply and pumping for construction of roads, bridges, and residential projects. The company is also involved in the procurement, planning, installation, and consultation activities; and provision of cargo handling, international trade, and computer software technology development and consultation services. Chien Kuo Construction Co., Ltd. was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
